description: recip(x) = ELSb(0, x) = 1/x in 1 node (was 2 nodes via EDL)

formulas_affected.name: SuperBEST table (recip row)
formulas_affected.note: Primary update. recip(x) = ELSb(0,x) is 1 node in F16.

formulas_affected.name: Gaussian curvature K(z = ln r) — geometry catalog
formulas_affected.note: Explicit recip sub-tree in mul+recip+neg decomposition drops 2n -> 1n.

formulas_unaffected.name: Taylor series 9N-3 cost law
formulas_unaffected.reason: Coefficients 1/n! are folded as constants (0 nodes). No recip node appears.

formulas_unaffected.name: Partition function Z = Tr[exp(-betaH)]
formulas_unaffected.reason: No reciprocal. Z = 1 matrix node (matrix exp) + Tr.

formulas_unaffected.name: Density matrix rho = exp(-betaH)/Z
formulas_unaffected.reason: Division by scalar Z uses EDL (1 node, already optimal). Not a unary recip.

formulas_unaffected.name: Free energy F = -ln(Z)/beta
formulas_unaffected.reason: No recip. Scalar ln + division by constant beta.

formulas_unaffected.name: Division x/y in 157-equation catalog
formulas_unaffected.reason: Division was already 1 node via EDL. R16-C1 covers unary 1/x only.

f6_note: In F6 (6-operator library), recip still requires 2 nodes. ELSb is not in F6.
search_principle: For every op in F16 \ F6 that accepts one argument directly, enumerate constant-argument specializations from {0,1}. R16-C1 fell out of ELSb(0,x).
